case_title: REPUBLIC REALTY SERVICE, INC. vs. RUFFINS, DIANE et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT RUFFINS, DIANE

NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-29-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER, CALENDAR OF OCT-20-1994 DEFENSE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED.PLAINTIFF MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED. NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATTER FACT. TEN DAY NOTICE PROPERLY STATES AMOUNT DUE;RENT DUE MONTHLY BASIS NOT DAILY THEREFORE EVEN AFTER CREDIT OF $28.00-BALAMCE WAS DUE & MTN PROPER. PLFF PREPARE ORDER.

CORRESPONDENCE RE: SETTLEMENT CONF. & TRIAL DATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF REPUBLIC REALTY SERVICE, INC.

JUDGE WICK, BETH WILBER - CLERK, BRENDA FIELDS - REPORTER C/C FOR JURY TRIAL, ALL PARTIES PRESENT, DEFT. DIANE RUFFINS PRESENT IN COURT, AND WAIVED JURY DEMAND ON THE RECORD. PARTIES STATE FOR THE RECORD THAT CASE WAS DOWN TO THE ISSUE OF A $28.00 ALLEGED RENT CREDIT. PARTIES AGREE TO SCHEDULE A MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IN DEPT 6. (PARTIES STIPULATED TO DISPOSITION OF ALL OTHER ISSUES) PARTIES TO SET A MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT TO BE HEARD IN DEPT. #6 ON 20-OCT-94.
